summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a high‑energy 4th of July show with standout performances of Jack Straw, Peggy‑O, Sugar Magnolia and One More Saturday Night
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard source and the electric atmosphere of this July 4th concert. The set is packed with memorable moments – Brent Mydland’s soaring keys on Me & My Uncle and Big River, a killer Jack Straw that turned many into Deadheads, and an unstoppable One More Saturday Night – while even the occasional lyrical slip is taken in good humor.

ai_rating.rationale: The overwhelming majority of reviews are 4‑5 stars and praise both the musical performance and the recording quality; only a single zero‑star review mentions a lyrical flub, so the overall rating stays in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the sound "excellent", "beautiful" and "the best recording I've ever heard of this show"; no complaints about noise or drop‑outs.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert bursts with energy from the opening parachute stunt, maintains a wild second‑set vibe, and is punctuated by fireworks and memorable jams that keep the crowd dancing all night.

band_member_comments.Jerry: A lyrical slip on Jack Straw was noted but otherwise his vocals and stage presence were praised.
band_member_comments.Bob: Solid rhythm guitar work; helped keep everything together during the Jack Straw lyric mishap.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland shines – keys roll in Me & My Uncle and a standout solo on Big River are repeatedly highlighted.
